query:
RENAME TABLE goals TO goals_old;

CREATE TABLE goals (
  id varchar(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  managerId varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  companyId varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  year int NOT NULL,
  businessMonth decimal(15,2),
  cancelledSales decimal(15,2),
  vsoRatio decimal(5,2),
  commissionReceived decimal(15,2),
  commissionSold decimal(15,2),
  commissionPending decimal(15,2),
  portfolioDisclosure decimal(15,2),
  prospectingMonth decimal(15,2),
  removalsMonth decimal(15,2),
  commissionPercentage decimal(5,2),
  businessOver1m decimal(15,2),
  readyCalls decimal(15,2),
  launchCalls decimal(15,2),
  avgReceiptTime decimal(10,2),
  cancelledPendingRatio decimal(5,2),
  avgSaleTime decimal(10,2),
  avgPropertyValue decimal(15,2),
  networkBusiness decimal(15,2),
  internalBusiness decimal(15,2),
  externalPartnership decimal(15,2),
  launchBusiness decimal(15,2),
  generalExpense decimal(15,2),
  taxExpense decimal(15,2),
  innovationFund decimal(15,2),
  partnersResult decimal(15,2),
  emergencyFund decimal(15,2),
  createdAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

DROP TABLE goals_old;
